results.title: FIFA WC 2026: Morocco’s Brahim Diaz left stunned after fight breaks out in press conference – WATCH
results.description: FIFA World Cup 2026: Brahim Diaz was left stunned after a fight between journalists disrupted Morocco’s pre-match press conference ahead of their quarterfinal clash against France.

results.title: Ex-Cardinals kicker Jay Feely backed by Trump, Barkley, more | Exclusive
results.description: Former NFL kicker Jay Feely spoke to The Republic about his campaign for the Republican nomination in Arizona's 1st Congressional District.

results.title: Unexpected Sophie Cunningham news had Fever fans worried
results.description: Sophie Cunningham and the Indiana Fever were in action on Wednesday night against the Los Angeles Sparks. The 6-foot-1 guard came off the bench and played 11 minutes in what turned out to be a blowout.
